startNumbers.description: Number of boxes to start with

maxNumbers.description: Maximum number of boxes for masking task (showDuration=0). Limited-hold tasks fixed at 5.

boxSizeDegrees.description: Size of number boxes in degrees visual angle

showDurations.description: List of limited-hold durations for blocks (0=masking task: numbers visible until first click with adaptive difficulty; >0=limited-hold task: numbers shown briefly then all masked, fixed at 5 items)

trialsPerLevel.description: Number of trials at each difficulty level

correctToAdvance.description: Number of correct trials needed to advance to next level

gridRows.description: Number of rows in the position grid

gridCols.description: Number of columns in the position grid

pixelsPerCm.description: Pixels per centimeter (overridden if calibrateScreen='internal'). For lab setups with known display properties.

eyeDistance.description: Eye distance from screen in inches (used for visual angle calculations)

calibrateScreen.description: Screen calibration mode: 'internal' (measure screen size with built-in calibration) or 'none' (use pixelsPerCm parameter)
